title: Premium Peanuts Whole Wild Bird Food, Nuts Food for All Species, Natural High Energy Feed, No Mess Bird Food for All Birds (1L Tub, Peanuts Whole)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 🪶 High-Energy Bird Feed – A nutrient-rich wild bird food perfect for year-round feeding. These whole peanuts for birds and squirrels are packed with natural goodness, attracting garden birds like jays, tits, and woodpeckers daily.

🌼 Sealed for Freshness – This 1L tub of shelled peanuts for birds comes in airtight packaging that locks in nutrients, flavor, and freshness. A premium wild bird food choice birds love—perfect for year-round garden feeding.

🌞 All Birds Welcome – Our premium bird food selection includes berry mix suets, sunflower hearts, mealworms for birds, black sunflower seeds, calci worms, niger seeds, peanuts, fat balls, and more—ideal wild bird food to attract a colorful mix to your garden.

📦 Value-Packed 1L Tub – Our bulk wild bird food, including niger seeds and peanuts, ensures fewer refills and a longer-lasting supply. Ideal for bird feeders, tables, and ground feeding—clean, easy feeding for all garden birds.
💬 Customer Satisfaction First – At Direct Deals 123, we’re proud to offer top-quality bird food that keeps both your garden birds and you happy. Your satisfaction is always our priority.

specifications_table.Special features: ‎Premium, High-Energy, No Mess, Sealed for Freshness, Attracts a wide variety of birds
